title: audit — notifications
description: Four notifications: compliance-officer alerts on retention-policy extension, 30-day expiry warning, weekly purge digest, and export-ready notice. Wired via the `notifications` core module. Category slugs live under the `audit.*` namespace.

categories.description: Alerts tenant compliance officers when a retention-policy override is created, updated, or approaches its expiry.
Weekly digest — how many audit rows were purged per tenant.
Informs the requester (DPO / compliance officer / platform admin) that an audit export finished processing.

notifications.trigger: AuditRetentionPolicyCreated event (or Updated when retention_years increased)
ExpireRetentionOverridesJob detected override_ends_at within config.audit.retention.expiring_soon_warning_days (30 by default)
notifications.notes: Fired once per policy (idempotent via the `expiring_soon_notified_at` column on the policy). Advance-warning window is tenant-tunable via settings.

notifications.trigger: Weekly digest — accumulated AuditPurgeExecuted events fire this on Sunday 06:00 UTC with a rollup
GenerateComplianceReportJob OR the DSAR export job completed successfully. Payload includes the signed S3 download URL (24h expiry).
